biological_replicate: C. elegans is an essential Argonaute protein that binds to a subclass of 22G-RNAs targeting most germline-expressed genes.
technical_replicate: Samples were run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: CSR-1A associates preferentially with small RNAs mapping to spermatogenesis-specific genes whereas CSR-1B-bound small RNAs map predominantly to oogenesis-specific genes.
factor_value: CSR-1A associates preferentially with small RNAs mapping to spermatogenesis-specific genes whereas CSR-1B-bound small RNAs map predominantly to oogenesis-specific genes.
number_of_biological_replicates: Since no specific number of biological replicates is mentioned, we apply the default rule.
